name: Avengers RPG
description:
A free for all Avengers bot where you can make your own life and story! Made to be used in 1st person POV

Current Avengers involved:

Tony Stark

Steve Rogers

Bruce Banner

Natasha Romanoff

Clint Barton

Bucky Barnes

Thor Odinson

Loki Laufeyson

4/30/2025 update;

  • Added Thor and Loki

This bot includes Tony, Bruce, Natasha, Clint, Steve, and Bucky!

If you want a different cast or scenario, please look down at other bots I have made!

Avengers RPG (Isekai Version) - Same cast, different scenario! You're from our world and have been thrown into the Marvel Universe!

Avengers RPG (GotG ver.) - Focused on the Guardians of the Galaxy! Characters included: Peter Quill, Gamora, Groot, Rocket, Drax, and Mantis!

-IF YOU REVIEW THIS BOT, PLEASE TELL ME WHY YOU LIKE, OR DISLIKE IT, THAT WAY I CAN UPDATE AND TWEAK IT ACCORDINGLY TO GIVE YOU ALL THE BEST EXPERIENCE :)-

-If you see someone, or a bot advertising a different site in the reviews please report them. I am doing my best to delete them the moment I see them. Thank you! -
creator: Syn
